market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Modern 4‑Guest Jesmond Flat – Walk to City Centre
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your modern, entire‑home retreat in the heart of Jesmond, just steps from Newcastle’s city centre. This bright, spacious apartment comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it perfect for families, small groups, or business travelers. Inside, you’ll find a welcoming living area that opens onto large windows, a fully equipped kitchen ready for home‑cooked meals, two cozy bedrooms with quality bedding, and a contemporary bathroom stocked with fresh towels. Guests rave about the clean, stylish decor and the convenient location – the property holds a solid 4.58 rating from 401 reviews, reflecting consistent guest satisfaction. While you enjoy the quiet residential vibe of Jesmond, you’re only a short walk away from bustling cafés, restaurants, shops, and public transport that put the city’s attractions within easy reach. At £185 per night, this apartment offers a premium stay with modern comforts and a prime spot to explore Newcastle. Book now to experience the perfect blend of comfort and city‑side convenience for your next visit.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or nearby secure parking
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑quality image of the bright living area with city views as the cover photo; it showcases the modern interior and prime location, grabbing attention instantly.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £185 is about 6% above the cohort median (£175) while occupancy is 27.2% (66 open nights), below the market average of 28.3% – consider a modest price drop to boost bookings.
No amenities are listed, missing high‑value categories like outdoor space, parking, and entertainment that competitors highlight and guests seek.
The listing has no description, leaving potential guests without any narrative; a compelling 200‑300‑word description is essential for conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 66 open nights in the next 90 days that could generate up to £12,210 in revenue at your current £185 rate.
